commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Dealing craftily, circumventing craftily, afflicting, and endeavouring to extirpate the race of the Israelites. (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Dealt subtly: he hints at their not liking to exterminate them openly: that they should cast out their young children, it says.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Dealt subtly: he hints at their not liking to exterminate them openly: that they should cast out their young children, it says. In which time Moses was born and was exceeding fair.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
